events.summary: Phase 0 (Research) opened. Three research streams dispatched in parallel: animation-studio inspiration, Vercel-adapted 3D tool survey, framework storytelling structure. Deliverable: research.md dossier.

Phase 0 (Research) dossier complete. 10 sections covering existing-refs audit, 14 animation-studio references, 14-tool comparison matrix, recommended stack (R3F+Drei+Theatre.js+glTF), 5-scene storyboard, house motion language (Calibrated Isometric), 5 motion primitives, color palette, and 12 PRD-phase open questions.

User scope directive (2026-05-12 evening): (1) reframe as STANDALONE feature, not extension of LifecycleLoop/DispatchReplay; (2) full cinematic animation experience, not hover-reveal docs; (3) instrumentation surface — the visual must enable additional data collection about how the framework operates. Existing 2D visuals (LifecycleLoop orbit + DispatchReplay) stay as-is. Reworking Section 5 storyboard, Section 2 existing-refs framing, adding new Section 5.5 on data-collection utility.

Research dossier v2 complete (revised per user directive). Reframed as standalone flagship (not extension of LifecycleLoop/DispatchReplay — those stay as-is per 'orbit stays' directive). Storyboard re-architected to 6-act ~3:15 cinematic following one feature's full lifecycle through a 'framework universe' (Threshold → Conception → Workshop Floor → Gate Chain → Shipping & Telemetry → Legacy/Calibration). Added Section 5.5 (Framework Instrumentation Surface) with 3 data streams: Visitor Analytics (A), Live Framework Telemetry (B), Operator-Mode View at /control-room/framework (C). Dossier now 558 lines / 10 sections.

Phase 0 (Research) paused at user request. Dossier v2 complete (597 lines, 10 sections, 6-act ~3:15 cinematic storyboard, 3 instrumentation streams, 15 open questions). Awaiting user approval to advance to Phase 1 (PRD). Resume protocol: (1) re-read .claude/features/3d-interactive-framework-flow-diagram/research.md; (2) confirm user is ready to advance to PRD or wants to revise dossier; (3) on advance, execute Phase Transition Procedure research → prd + Tier 2.2 phase_started event.

Phase 0 (Research) approved. 597-line dossier shipped via PR #324 (16312b0) covers 8 binding decisions in §8 + 5 motion primitives + 6-act storyboard + 3-stream instrumentation surface (visitor analytics, live framework telemetry, operator mode). 4 pre-PRD blockers resolved in §7.A: Q1=Pixar clean-tech, Q2=hybrid procedural+glTF, Q15=Framework Universe, Q10=Track A launch window.

Phase 1 (PRD) opened. User approved Phase 0 dossier with 4 blockers resolved. PRD scope: standalone /framework or /framework/universe public-site feature, ~3:15 cinematic 6-act 3D experience in Pixar clean-tech mood, hybrid authoring (procedural R3F shell + glTF hero pieces), dual purpose (external explainer + internal instrumentation surface across 3 streams), Lighthouse ≥95 hard contract, WCAG 2.3.3 compliance, Track A launch window pre-v8.0 (2026-06-18).

Phase 1 → Phase 2 advancement: OQ-1 closed (AC-10 rephrase + AC-11 added), OQ-2 closed (feature-roster.json aggregator contract locked in §Data Contracts), OQ-3D-A closed (pattern-skill-map.json shipped via PR #615 bb6ae2b). OQ-3 deferred non-blocking. Framework version bumped v7.8.3 → v7.9.1. Paused 2026-05-13 → 2026-06-04, 22 days.

Phase 2 tasks.md drafted — 36 tasks across 10 Phase-4 groups (data pipeline, primitives, per-act scenes, glTF hero, interaction, fallback tiers, routes, analytics, HADF Phase 3a hooks, tests). All 17 ACs mapped. T-hadf-sensing-layer-hooks reserves a slot for parallel-shipped HADF Phase 3a sensing/observability layer (operator's other-agent worktree commit 39cc84a).
